exchanges.expected: Sí, quiero inscribirme en el gimnasio, por favor.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I want to sign up for the gym, please.

exchanges.expected: Mi rutina incluye pesas y cardio.
exchanges.hint: My routine includes weights and cardio.

exchanges.expected: Sí, tengo mi toalla limpia aquí.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I have my clean towel here.

exchanges.expected: Sí, no sé cómo usar la caminadora.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I don't know how to use the treadmill.

exchanges.expected: Vengo al gimnasio tres veces a la semana.
exchanges.hint: I come to the gym three times a week.

exchanges.expected: No, prefiero entrenar solo por ahora.
exchanges.hint: No, I prefer to train alone for now.

exchanges.expected: Los vestidores están al fondo a la izquierda.
exchanges.hint: The locker rooms are at the back to the left.

exchanges.expected: Sí, acabo de terminar mi entrenamiento.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I just finished my workout.
